title: Junior Business Development Manager at WeWork India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at WeWork India
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
